jeirecipemanager.message.recipe_toggle.n: Only operators can enable or disable recipes
jeirecipemanager.tooltip.recipe_add.star: Add recipe: click to edit, then drag JEI items onto recipe slots
jeirecipemanager.tooltip.recipe_add.edit: Editing recipe: drag JEI items onto input or output slots
jeirecipemanager.tooltip.recipe_add.star: Modify generated recipe: click to edit
jeirecipemanager.tooltip.recipe_add.edit: Modifying generated recipe: drag JEI items onto input or output slots
jeirecipemanager.tooltip.recipe_add.subm: Save changes to this generated recipe
jeirecipemanager.message.recipe_add.fail: Failed to generate recipe from this template
jeirecipemanager.message.recipe_delete.n: Only operators can delete generated recipes
